response.justification: The candidate is a versatile, experienced senior engineer with strong fundamentals, testing discipline, and polyglot breadth, but the profile does not match a Principal/IC6 growth-and-experimentation role. There is no evidence of building experimentation platforms, feature-flagging systems, metrics/telemetry infrastructure, or statistical analysis work, and career history shows senior/staff IC roles at small-to-mid companies rather than multi-workstream, cross-organization technical leadership at enterprise scale. The strongest scale signal (high-throughput data integration at Dunnhumby) is adjacent but ended in 2020 and was not experimentation-focused.
strengths: 15+ years of hands-on engineering across web, backend, embedded, and mobile with strong TDD/craftsmanship practices
Experience with high-throughput, low-latency distributed services (millions of HTTP requests/sec at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic)
Recent AI-agent infrastructure and developer-tooling work (MCP code generators), matching the AI-velocity preferred qualification
concerns: No experimentation, A/B testing, feature-flighting, or growth-measurement platform experience — the core of the role
No demonstrated principal-level scope: leading multi-team initiatives, org-wide architecture, or platforms adopted across many teams
Limited evidence of data/statistics aptitude (metrics design, guardrails, bias detection, experimental analysis)

key_factors.factor: Strong general engineering breadth and scale-adjacent systems work
